description: This vogue Sasha shoe from puma has a cute round toe and quirky asymetrical strap which will flatter your feet. The shiny patent leather lends a formal air while the puma logo keeps this shoe sporty making it a versatile choice &ndash wear it along with casual or semi-formal outfits when you want to give your feet a totally cushioned and comfortable ride. Upper Patent leather upper for durability and high shine Slip-on style for easy wear with a stylish diagonal strap Printed Puma Jumping cat logo detail in white Outsole embedded onto the heel cup for better backfoot protection Midsole Soft, highly cushioned, knitted inner lining and footbed for all day step-in comfort Outsole Racetrack-inspired rubber outsole for traction and performance Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
